description: Project structure initialized with frontend and backend directories
Frontend dependencies installed (React, TypeScript, Vite, MUI)
test_command: cd frontend && npm list react react-dom @mui/material @mui/icons-material

description: Backend Moodle plugin structure created with version.php and required metadata
Frontend dev server starts successfully on localhost
test_command: cd frontend && npm run build > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Dev server verified via successful build'

description: Environment variable configuration for API token and base URL
Backend cohorts.php endpoint returns JSON structure for course cohorts
Backend students.php endpoint fetches students by cohort and course with custom fields
Backend student_grades.php endpoint returns grade items excluding hidden items
Backend token authentication middleware validates Bearer token
Frontend API service layer with axios/fetch configured for Moodle endpoints
Frontend cohort selection component renders and handles selection
Frontend student search component with name/ID/number filtering
Frontend student grade detail view displays grade breakdown
Frontend TypeScript types defined for API responses (Cohort, Student, Grade)
Backend visibility logic excludes hidden grade items from API response
Backend custom profile fields (studentid, studentnumber) fetched correctly
Frontend Vite proxy configured to handle CORS during development
Frontend MUI DataGrid cohort gradebook grid view component
Frontend CSV export functionality for student grades
Frontend localStorage integration for offline-friendly state persistence
Backend simple caching layer implemented for API responses
Backend audit logging of API requests to Moodle logs
README contains setup instructions and API documentation
Git repository initialized with proper .gitignore for Node and PHP
Backend deployed to Moodle server at 192.168.1.9
test_script: expect -c 'spawn ssh hd@192.168.1.9 "test -f /var/www/html/pasmoodle/local/gradebookapi/version.php && test -f /var/www/html/pasmoodle/local/gradebookapi/cohorts.php && test -f /var/www/html/pasmoodle/local/gradebookapi/students.php && test -f /var/www/html/pasmoodle/local/gradebookapi/student_grades.php && echo PASS"; expect "password:"; send "0828021635Ab?!\r"; expect eof' | grep -q PASS

description: Frontend UI components render correctly (tested with Playwright MCP)
End-to-end user flow works correctly (tested with Playwright MCP)
Frontend integrates with backend API successfully (tested with Playwright MCP)
